name: §6Seal
description:
§8Fishing Pet

§7Fishing Speed: §b[Fishing Speed]
§7Sea Creature Chance: §35%
§7Treasure Chance: §6[Treasure Chance]%

§6Showboater
§7Increases your chance of catching
§5Bouncy Beach Balls§7 and §6Giant Bouncy
§6Beach Balls§7 during the §9Year of the
§9Seal§7 by §a100%§7.

§6Peak Performance
§7Gain a §a5%§7 chance to materialize some
§9Treasure Bait§7 in your inventory
§7upon catching §6Treasure§7. Materializes
§aGolden Bait§7 instead during the §9Year
§9of the Seal§7.

§6Amphibious
§7Increases the base stats of this pet
§7by §a100%§7 during the §9Year of the Seal.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY
